summary: CocoIndex memoization and dependency invalidation transfer to TypeScript and SQLite as invariants, not as the heed KV or Rust PyO3 runtime substrate.

claim: Canonical input hashing transfers directly; implement a deterministic TypeScript canonicalizer over parser inputs and tool arguments.
evidence: rust/py/src/memo_fingerprint.rs:136-143 exposes fingerprint_simple_object as the Rust digest entry point
rust/py/src/memo_fingerprint.rs:13-133 uses explicit type tags for supported Python values
lib/parsing/memory-parser.ts:888-890 already computes SHA-256 content hashes

claim: Code or logic hash invalidation transfers as a stored dependency check.
evidence: rust/core/src/state/db_schema.rs:181-190 stores logic_deps on component memoization
rust/core/src/state/db_schema.rs:198-216 stores logic_deps and dependency_memo_entries on function memo entries
rust/core/src/engine/execution.rs:101-108 rejects component memo hits when logic deps are not present
rust/core/src/engine/execution.rs:249-252 rejects function memo hits when logic deps are not present

claim: The heed encoded-key database should become relational SQLite tables for memo records, dependency edges, target tracking, and target ownership.
evidence: rust/core/src/state/db_schema.rs:20-42 defines typed stable path entry keys inside a heed bytes database
rust/core/src/state/db_schema.rs:94-132 multiplexes stable paths, target state, and id sequencing through DbEntryKey
lib/search/vector-index-schema.ts:2356-2419 shows memory_index already holds metadata columns but not DAG state

claim: memory_index_scan needs to become DAG-aware while preserving the existing mtime and content-hash fast path.
evidence: lib/storage/incremental-index.ts:172-186 skips unchanged files and checks content_hash when present
lib/storage/incremental-index.ts:189-190 marks changed mtimes as modified
handlers/memory-index.ts:173-188 delegates single-file indexing to indexMemoryFile

claim: The Rust PyO3 state-handler callback model should not be ported; TypeScript stages should declare dependencies explicitly.
evidence: python/cocoindex/_internal/function.py:895-910 conditionally builds a state_handler that feeds observed context dependencies into comp_ctx.logic_deps
rust/core/src/engine/execution.rs:1460-1469 writes component memoization through the Rust transaction batcher
